allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''dotenv''\); d.config\(\); console.log\(''dotenv OK:'', d.version || ''loaded''\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\(''./server/package.json''\); console.log\(''SERVER:''\); Object.entries\(p.dependencies\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\('' '',k,v\)\); const c=require\(''./client/package.json''\); console.log\(''CLIENT:''\); Object.entries\({...c.dependencies,...c.devDependencies}\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\('' '',k,v\)\);")

Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); require\(''./src/controllers/flightController''\); require\(''./src/services/airlabsService''\); require\(''./src/services/amadeusService''\); require\(''./src/models/aircraftData''\); console.log\(''All server modules OK''\)")
